title: Syrup Village Returns to Peace
description: On pages 10–13, the Syrup Village arc settles after Kuro’s defeat, focusing on Usopp’s decision, Kaya’s gratitude, and the end of the Usopp Pirates.
scene: The village chooses peace and secrecy while Usopp prepares to leave, turning his old lies into the beginning of a real journey.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Really? Usopp hasn't come running through yet

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Mommy, is the big liar not coming today?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Is that lying brat not here yet!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: were we a little too harsh on him yes- tenday...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oh, I'm sure he'll come tomorrow

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Pliman! How could you get your clothes dirty so early in the morning?! Go wash up!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Ye... Yes, Mom!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ninji, have you seen the Frying Pan? I can't make scrambled eggs without it...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Uh... I, I'll have them uncooked! I like them uncooked!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Did you break your glasses again, Tamanegi?!?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm so sorry, Mom!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Thank you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's all thanks to you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: IF IT WEREN'T FOR YOU GUYS...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The village couldn't have been protected

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What are you saying?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: If you hadn't done anything, I wouldn't have either

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Same here

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That doesn't matter,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I was able to get the treasure

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: In light of this...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There's a deci- sion I've made...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What... Did you just say?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: After such a distaster,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: We are to act as though nothing has had- pened?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Would you rather not?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: How good- natural this young man is...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He says it's best for the village- ERS?

dialogue.speaker: Merry
dialogue.text: Are you alright with that, Ojousama?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: If usopp- San says it is the best, then I will do so

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: ...I see, yes, I will go along with your story

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And Meri,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: There's a favor I'd like to ask of you

dialogue.speaker: Usopp Pirate
dialogue.text: Captain usopp, what is it that you wanted to talk to us about?

summary: This part gives Syrup Village an emotional farewell: Usopp protects the village’s peace, says goodbye to his friends, and steps toward becoming a real pirate.
